channel.title: drush on Jacob Sanford
channel.description: Recent content in drush on Jacob Sanford

item.title: Re-Thinking Workflows : Development and Maintenance of Drupal Instances at Scale
item.description: For the past several years, we have been developing and managing a moderate amount of Drupal instances across several VM hosts using a homegrown product we call pushback. It leverages drush in conjunction with Jenkins and gitHub. Why develop a custom framework? Although several products existed [1] [2], none seemed to meet our desire for simplicity and maintainability. Pushback was born through discussions with Jen Whitney and Kassim Machioudi, and was inspired by the (now-abandoned) Tugboat project by Lullabot.
